Hey, what's going on guys? I just wanted to give you a quick overview before the overview of the group pitch. So this whole sales section is the next kind of evolution of selling since it's just more leveraged. If you can accomplish in one hour what would take you normally four hours, then you are accomplishing a lot. And if you can do the same thing with your employee, then you get three more hours of productivity from that same person and there's less effort overall. So the next video kind of dives deep into why group selling is kind of the next natural step. But I wanted to make this video just to sort of qualify the fact that group selling can be used. The pitch that is going to follow this is the normal cashback script. There is one section at the end that has updates to that after having released that and some of the feedback that we had and some of the improvements that some of the other gym owners put together that were sweet and just tightened up everything. And just kind of everything is more or less the same from beginning to end. The only things that change are the clothes. So clothes number one is your normal cashback clothes. Clothes number two is going to be your credit only clothes. And then clothes number three is the green bribe which do you prefer EFT play. That clothes is in the make sense. Rock and roll.
